message:
feat: contributor profile pages with topic clustering and cadence analytics (#1353)

* chore: add wink-nlp for contributor topic clustering

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: add contributor profile data generation with topic clustering

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: add contributor profile page with topic focus and cadence

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: link leaderboard rows to contributor profiles

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ci: add contributor profile generation to workflow and sitemap

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* chore: add generated contributor profile data

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: keep name linking to GitHub, add bar chart icon for stats page

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Revert "fix: keep name linking to GitHub, add bar chart icon for stats page"

This reverts commit bff829bc050b604ebe8ed6a4dc26fe7ec3d62d6a.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: stretch suggestions show console codebase areas instead of issues

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -25,11 +25,16 @@ jobs:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.LEADERBOARD_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
         run: node scripts/generate-leaderboard.mjs
 
+      - name: Generate contributor profiles
+        env:
+          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.LEADERBOARD_GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+        run: node scripts/generate-contributor-profiles.mjs
+
       - name: Commit and push if changed
         run: |
           git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
           git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
-          git add public/data/leaderboard.json
+          git add public/data/leaderboard.json public/data/contributors/
           git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" && exit 0
-          git commit -m "chore: update leaderboard data"
+          git commit -m "chore: update leaderboard and contributor profile data"
           git push
